feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Working on a sci-fi universe. I'd like your help with designing a female command…
entry.content: Working on a sci-fi universe. I'd like your help with designing a female commando, here's what i am thinking.. Appearance, an ubermensch type look. >Blonde Hair, Blue eyes, Perfect physical condition and features. Personality >Goal to continue the generations of selective breeding by any means, canonically has twins with her commander after attempting SA but being buck broken by commander. >Such lines as.. "I'll take the rapist" >"That's therapist.." >"I know what i said"

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Digimon Story Time Stranger which version should I buy?
entry.content: Not interested in ultimate because a bunch of costumes and some additional music is not worth that money, Deluxe edition got extra mons and a farm item + some extra story content . Is it worth it?

entry.title: /int/ International: Is he really the only one to blame?
entry.content: https://youtu.be/g5XZ3JPgFs4&t=483 Look closely. Those "victims" didn't even try to avoid him either. In Japan, when a street is narrow or crowded, you're not supposed to walk side-by-side with someone else, so you don't bump into people coming from the opposite direction. By the way, when I was about 20 years old, I did the exact same thing to a group of white men. They were walking side-by-side towards me, occupying the full width of the sidewalk. One of them and I collided head-on. I braced m

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >bunch of articles come out about how the movie is in Middle English >trailer dr…

entry.title: /int/ International: The Bronx
entry.content: This place is definitely New York’s shithole. I’ve met amazing individuals here who have qualities beyond any I’ve seen and I’m grateful for it everyday. However, that’s a very small small sample of people that I feel like lucky to even come across. People here are obnoxious, loud, toxic, and in lack of a better term “ghetto”. For the longest time I was a believer that socioeconomic factors cause this behavior; I was so wrong. It’s culture and they revel in it, behaving this way is practically a

Talk about artists or commissioners, mostly the bad ones or those who got under your skin. Share your experiences and get angry with us. For all artists (and commissioners who are close friends with artists) here, beware of: Horu, Pixxy, OkiOppai, Timedwatcher, AnythingGoes, Skitterleaf, kathielnotfound (Jocelyn Jones), and Snoopcrow/jbunny/j6un9 (

entry.title: /mu/ Music: In which the unbelievably dull El Lay alt-rappers fabricate the brightest actual…
entry.content: In which the unbelievably dull El Lay alt-rappers fabricate the brightest actual pop album of 2003. They remain unbelievable, but in pop that's just one more aesthetic nuance. Titles like "Let's Get Retarded," "Shut Up," and the guitar-driven "Anxiety" are what you'd hope except cleaner--tremendous ups every one. You can bet new member Fergie, a showbiz lifer who also put in a tour as JC Chasez's girlfriend, lured her pal Justin down for "Where Is the Love," an actual hit that actually called ou

entry.content: The Steve Miller Band: Recall the Beginning . . . A Journey from Eden [Capitol, 1972] I think this is a concept album in which Miller's rejection by a female drummer named Kim symbolizes "all the pointless suffering/Humanity." But I don't intend to make sure. C-

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Alan Ritchson and Owen Wilson must protect a little girl’s liver from the cartel in RUNNER
entry.content: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vor uzvo6e4w >Former soldier turned private courier Hank Malone (Alan Ritchson) races against time to help medical representative Ben Bishop (Owen Wilson) transport a liver from Brisbane to the Gold Coast in time to save a little girl while being pursued by a ruthless cartel whose leader Damián Zaldívar (Rodrigo Santoro) wants the organ for himself.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: nyt javascript
entry.content: when i access nytimes.com on my desktop, my disk activity skyrockets for about 10-15 seconds when i close the site, activity remains very high for another 10-15 seconds i have plenty of ram, so paging isn't an issue i know sites like nytimes.com runs tons of javascripts for a variety of reasons wtf javascripts are causing this behavior though? it feels like my computer is getting used for cryptomining or some shit. it's the only site that behaves like this

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Go back to Google services?
entry.content: I've been using my phone for years without a Google account, replacing the pre-installed apps with open-source ones. Today I was thinking about going back to being a normal person and just using Google services without any hassle. Has anyone else been in a similar situation?
